rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"ensureFeatureBranchIfNeeded only synced base branch when prNumber was set — it never checked out the PR head branch, so pipeline ran on wrong branch.","scope":"kody engine cli.js"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"The fix target is the compiled engine at node_modules/@kody-ade/engine/dist/bin/cli.js, not source. Must also add prHeadBranch to ctx.input.","scope":"kody engine"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"When patching a dependency's compiled output, both the context population and the function logic must be updated together.","scope":"kody engine patch strategy"},{"kind":"convention","text":"PR details from getPRDetails include both baseBranch and headBranch — both must be stored in ctx.input and used together.","scope":"kody engine pr context"}]}
